risk: Many-to-many joins or duplicate keys alter target rate.
control: Use stable borrower-record key and duplicate checks.

risk: Missing or inconsistent inputs distort model scores.
control: Track missingness, range, and logical consistency; open data-quality issues for breaches.

risk: Repayment-derived variables leak future outcome information.
control: Exclude repayment-derived variables from modelling features and document exceptions.

risk: Sensitive or proxy variables may cause unfair outcomes.
control: Exclude direct sensitive fields from baseline model; use only for approved audit review.

risk: Ranking performance deteriorates after portfolio changes.
control: Monitor PR-AUC, ROC-AUC, recall, precision, F1, Brier score when labels mature.

risk: Threshold creates too many reviews or too many missed defaults.
control: Use validation-selected threshold with review-rate cap and test confirmation.

risk: Model decisions cannot be understood by stakeholders.
control: Maintain SHAP, local reasons, anchor-style rules, and counterfactual diagnostics.

risk: Score, feature, or data-quality drift changes model behaviour.
control: Track score distribution, top-feature drift, review rate, realized default outcomes.
Version model artifact, training code, features, threshold, and governance outputs together.
